name: project_docs_init
description: Initializes the 5 standardized documentation files (ProjectOverview.md, Settings.md, TaskingLog.md, AInotes.md, ErrorLog.md) in a sandboxed project directory. Run this at the start of any new project or when onboarding to an existing project that lacks these files.

project_dir.description: Absolute path to the sandboxed project directory.
